results.question: Show revenue, revenue share percentage, units sold, gross profit, and gross margin percentage by product category. Return columns: Category, revenue, revenue_share_pct, units_sold, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.
results.sql: SELECT category."Category", SUM(sales."Total Product Cost") AS revenue, SUM(sales."Total Product Cost") * (100.0 / SUM(sales."Unit Price Discount Pct")) AS revenue_share_pct, SUM(sales."Order Quantity") AS units_sold, SUM(sales."Total Product Cost") * (1.0 - (SUM(sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") / 100.0)) AS gross_profit, SUM(sales."Total Product Cost") * (1.0 - (SUM(sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") / 100.0)) * (100.0 / SUM(sales."Unit Price Discount Pct")) AS gross_margin_pct FROM Sales_Territory JOIN Sales ON Sales_Territory."SalesTerritoryKey" = Sales."SalesTerritoryKey" JOIN Sales ON Sales."SalesOrderLineKey" = Sales."ProductKey" JOIN Product ON Sales."ProductKey" = Product."ProductKey" GROUP BY category."Category" ORDER BY revenue_desc_descORDERBY."Total Product Cost" DESC, units_sold_descORDERBY."Order Quantity" DESC, gross_profit_descORDERBY."Total Product Cost" DESC, gross_margin_pct_descORDERBY."Total Product Cost" DESC, category."Category"
